statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total_in=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_out=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); total_tokens=$(( total_in + total_out )); time_now=$(date +%H:%M:%S); if [ -n "$used" ]; then tokens_part=$(printf 'tokens: %.0f%%' "$used"); else tokens_part='tokens: --'; fi; printf '%s  |  chats: %d tok  |  time: %s' "$tokens_part" "$total_tokens" "$time_now"
